items.title: Chiesa di Gesù e Maria
items.role: Sicilian seat of the devotion in Acireale, where Sant'Espedito is venerated with a dedicated altar and feast.

items.title: Capilla de Santo Domingo y San Expedito
Cpilla Nuestra señora de Lourdes y San Expedito
Ermita El Inmaculado de María y San Expedito
Parroquia de San Fermín y San Expedito
Santuario de San Expedito, Bermejo
items.role: Desert pilgrimage sanctuary (wikidata Q6121548); a major rural counterpart to Balvanera, drawing mass pilgrimage in San Juan province.

items.title: Iglesia de San Luis Gonzaga y San Expedito
Église Saint-Pierre
items.role: Historic French center of the devotion; Saint-Expédit statue and votive practice in the old-town parish.

Santuario San Expedito — Parroquia Nuestra Señora de Balvanera
items.role: Argentina's principal urban shrine; enormous April 19 feast-day queues in the Once/Balvanera district.

items.title: Statue de Saint-Expédit de la Route des Plaines
Franziskanerkirche
items.role: Central-European foothold: the Franciscan church in Graz keeps an Expeditus altar/devotion, a rare German-speaking outpost of the cult.

items.title: Église Saint-Cannat les Prêcheurs
items.role: Site of Fleurié's vow — the Marseille devotion that helped launch the modern French cult of saint Expédit.

items.title: Our Lady of Guadalupe Chapel / International Shrine of St. Jude
items.role: Home of the famous St. Expedite statue beside the door; center of the New Orleans cult and its voodoo-adjacent folk devotion.

items.title: Chiesa di San Espedito (Sant'Espedito)
items.role: Church built in 1935 in Palermo's Libertà district — one of very few churches anywhere titled directly to the saint (OSM node 266892536).

items.title: Santuario San Expedito (Parroquia Nuestra Señora de las Dolores)
items.location: Reñaca, Viña del Mar (Avenida Borgoño), Chile
items.role: Chile's best-known San Expedito shrine, on the Reñaca coastal road; mapped in OSM as place of worship 'San Expedito'.

items.title: Igreja Nossa Senhora da Lapa dos Mercadores
items.location: Rio de Janeiro (Rua do Ouvidor 35, Centro), Brazil
items.role: Historic center church hosting Rio's principal Santo Expedito devotion and feast-day crowds.

items.title: Notre-Dame de la Délivrance
items.role: Church where the first public statue of Saint Expédit on Réunion was installed in 1931 — seed of the island-wide roadside cult.

items.title: Chapelle Saint-Expédit de Mare Longue (chapel complex, RN2)
items.role: Roadside chapel complex founded by Joseph Tafiki in 1933; the oldest and best-known of Réunion's red wayside shrines to the saint.

items.title: Santuário Diocesano de Santo Expedito
items.location: Santo Expedito, São Paulo state, Brazil
items.role: Diocesan sanctuary in the only municipality named for the saint; regional pilgrimage hub in western São Paulo state.

items.title: Capela Militar de Santo Expedito (Capelania Militar)
items.role: Military chapel in Luz whose feast day draws hundreds of thousands; epicenter of the modern Brazilian boom in the devotion.

items.title: Basilique Notre-Dame la Daurade
items.role: Toulouse anchor of the 19th–20th c. French devotion, paired with Bordeaux Saint-Pierre in the historical record.
